## Summary

Describe the purpose of this PR and what it changes.

## Related issue

Fixes # (issue number) or link to related discussion.

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, `test/*`, `hotfix/*`, `release/*`)
- [ ] Target branch is correct (`develop` or `main` for hotfixes/release)
- [ ] CI (`CI` workflow) is passing
- [ ] At least one approval from a reviewer
- [ ] Tests added or updated (unit / e2e) if applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

## Labels

- Add label `automerge` if you want this PR to be merged automatically after CI passes and approvals are present. Note: PR must target `main` for auto-merge to run.

## Notes

Add any additional notes, migration steps, or screenshots here.
